rulings.Case Title: YIN FALK VS. LINDA S CATRON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Cause Why An Order For Sale Of Dwellings Should Not Issue
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 30, 2013, line 1. Order To Show Cause Why An Order For Sale Of Dwellings Should Not Issue GRANTED, no opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MICHEL RANTISSI VS. FRANK SHATTUCK et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Moiton To Determine Prevailing Party On Contract And To Fix Amount Of Attorneys Fees Allowable As Item Of Costs, Punitive Damages,
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 30, 2013, line 2. PLAINTIFF MICHEL RANTISSI's Motion To Determine Prevailing Party On Contract And To Fix Amount Of Attorneys Fees Allowable As Item Of Costs, Punitive Damages, DENIED: (1) No evidence presented to the Court regarding basis for attorney's fees; (2) no evidence presented to the Court of defendants' financial condition; and (3) Defendant Shammas filed for bankruptcy on October 18, 2012. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DEAN C. LAMB VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 30, 2013, line 3. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part, 10 days to answer. P sufficiently alleges facts to support all elements of each cause of action (except 7th causes of action), including intent, damages, outrageous conduct and duty under Biakanja factors. Demurrer to the second "sixth" cause of action for Loss of Credit Expectancy is sustained without leave to amend. No substantive opposition. Defendant's counsel is ordered again (See CGC-13-529095 6/14/13 minute order) to comply with SFLR 2.6C. Non-compliance causes unnecessary confusion and delay. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GENEVA TERRACE PROPERTY OWNERS ASSOCIATION, INC. VS. WEDGEWOOD, INC. et al
